customer_psychology.customer_profile: Nguoi nghi ngo bi theo doi/gian diep, cam xuc lo lang, mua tren impulse (cam xuc cao)
customer_psychology.best_timing: Buoi toi 20-23h (khi khach lo lang, chua duoc giai toa)
customer_psychology.avoid_timing: Gio hanh chinh 9-17h (khach dang ban, khong focus vao security)
customer_psychology.emotional_angle: FEAR (so bi theo doi) + RELIEF (giai toa lo lang) + CONTROL (kiem soat duoc gi dien ra)
customer_psychology.cta_pattern: Bao ve quyen rieng tu cua ban NGAY hom nay | Khong de ai nghe len cuoc tro chuyen | Kiem tra 100% thiet bi an trong 30 giay
customer_psychology.avoid_angle: Khong noi 'gia re', 'khuyen mai' — gia khong phai concern; trust + effective moi la.
